Interface ISegmentID

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that allow simple manipulations of IDs at the segment level.

[Guid("703052BD-25F1-11D3-9F3F-00C04F6BDF0D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISegmentID

Methods

GetIDs(out int, out int)

Get the IDs on the segment's endpoints.

void GetIDs(out int fromID, out int toID)

Parameters

fromID int
toID int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetIDs(int, int)

Set the IDs on the segment's endpoints.

void SetIDs(int fromID, int toID)

Parameters

fromID int
toID int
